title: Stir Fry with Pineapple and Eastern Nuts
description: A quick and easy Asian-inspired stir fry dish with a sweet and tangy twist from the pineapple.

ingredients.name: Blanched middle eastern vegetables (such as carrots, bell peppers, and broccoli)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Eastern nuts and cook until lightly toasted, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the blanched middle eastern vegetables and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the pineapple and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, ginger, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and nuts, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the sesame oil and serve hot.
Serve over rice or noodles, if desired.
